bastia.name: Workshop in Bastia (Corsica)
bastia.summary: Experience Aqua Dance Flow with Julie Gautier from September 19–21, 2025 in Bastia. Discover the art of underwater movement in a stunning Mediterranean setting.

romont.name: Workshop in Romont (Switzerland)
romont.summary: Dive into the world of Aqua Dance Flow with Julie Gautier on September 13–14, 2025 in Romont. An immersive experience combining freediving and body movement.

villefranche.name: Open Day
villefranche.summary: Discover Aqua Dance Flow x NUC on August 24, 9am–12pm, at Plage de l’Ange Gardien. Program: Welcome, Breathing, Ground Dance, Watsu, Water Dance. ***Free intro session.
villefranche.banner: ADF × NUC Open Day – Aug 24 · Plage de l’Ange Gardien

hero.text: Run, jump, fly, dance underwater. A new way to practice freediving.

footer.tagline: Julie Gautier and Cressi, partners in the Aqua Dance Flow project, present the exclusive “Aqua Dance Flow x Julie Gautier” collection—born of shared expertise blending innovation, art, and technical excellence.

newsletter.title: Join the ADF Community
newsletter.text: Join us to stay updated on the latest experiences, events, and Aqua Dance Flow initiations.

story.title: UNDERWATER DANCE
story.text: Aqua Dance Flow (ADF) is a new athletic and artistic discipline inspired by the film AMA, created by Julie Gautier. This form of artistic expression introduces a new way to practice freediving: running, jumping, flying, and dancing underwater. Born from Julie Gautier’s unique vision, ADF expands the artistic possibilities of swimming, beyond just knowing how to swim or freedive.

quote.text: On land, I am an ordinary dancer, but underwater, I am completely free, and I fly. I feel liberated, carried, and serene... You don't need to be a freediving champion or a professional dancer, the magic of water takes over and makes every experience unforgettable.

experiences.title: Dive into a Unique Experience
experiences.text: The initiations will be led by Julie Gautier herself, who will guide you in exploring your potential, releasing your tensions, and discovering the joy of moving underwater.

contact.title: Contact ADF
contact.text: For any questions or inquiries, feel free to reach out to us. We would be happy to answer and tell you more about Aqua Dance Flow.

events.title: Our Upcoming Events
events.text: Discover the upcoming Aqua Dance Flow initiations and workshops. Each session is an invitation to explore your aquatic potential in a world of weightlessness and creativity. Book your spot now to experience a unique moment with Julie Gautier.
